message:
feat(tools,guard): attachment processing, thread ID validation, and guard environment tests

Messaging:
- Added is_valid_explicit_thread_id() that rejects bare numeric thread
  IDs, which are reserved for reply-seeded threads. This prevents
  accidental collision between explicit and auto-generated thread IDs.
- Added process_message_attachments() for handling file attachments in
  messages: processes markdown image references, copies attachment files
  to the archive directory, and generates attachment metadata. Supports
  configurable embed policies and markdown image conversion.

Reservations:
- Extended reservation handling with additional validation and improved
  conflict detection logic.

Tests:
- contact_policy_parity: Expanded parity tests to cover new contact
  policy scenarios and edge cases.
- validation_error_parity: Added new test cases for validation error
  consistency across the tools layer.

Guard:
- Enhanced guard module with additional environment-aware checks and
  configurable enforcement levels.
- Added guard_env_tests: New test suite for environment-dependent guard
  behavior, verifying correct enforcement across different runtime
  configurations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
